dict.string: Supacool
Supacool
A program running within Supacool would like to use AppleScript.
A program running within Supacool would like to access your system's audio.
A program running within Supacool would like to use Bluetooth.
A program running within Supacool would like to access your Calendar.
A program running within Supacool would like to use the camera.
A program running within Supacool would like to access your Contacts.
A program running within Supacool would like to access the local network.
A program running within Supacool would like to access your location information.
A program running within Supacool would like to use your location temporarily.
A program running within Supacool would like to use your microphone.
A program running within Supacool would like to access motion data.
A program running within Supacool would like to access your Photo Library.
A program running within Supacool would like to access your reminders.
A program running within Supacool would like to use speech recognition.
A program running within Supacool requires elevated privileges.
https://github.com/jzillmann/supacool/releases/latest/download/appcast.xml
eBdTbl+6sR8gxO1zyzyvdQHuJrXMLxD31oCc+JoW5jo=
